title: Create:Gavinite
description: This project adds a whole new ore (gavinite) to the game! and you can use it to make a lot of things!(this mod is wip)
body: **Create:Gavinite** is a content-packed Minecraft mod that introduces a powerful new material and a growing set of items, blocks, and mechanics built around it. Discover Gavinite deep in the world, refine it through custom processes, and use it to craft unique tools, weapons, and machines with special behaviors. The mod focuses on progression, experimentation, and fun systems rather than simple copy-paste gear. As the mod continues to expand, Gavinite will gain new uses including advanced crafting, automation features, special effects, and integration with other mechanics. Designed for Minecraft Java Edition, Gavinite aims to feel balanced, creative, and rewarding while still being exciting to discover. Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or technical player, Gavinite adds new goals, surprises, and possibilities to your world.
